snowwarning.name: Snow Warning
snowwarning.official_desc: Summons snow for 5 turns when the Pokémon enters a battle.

soundproof.name: Soundproof
soundproof.official_desc: The Pokémon is immune to sound-based moves.

pressure.name: Pressure
pressure.official_desc: Causes opponents to expend 1 more PP when using moves against the Pokémon.

superluck.name: Super Luck
superluck.official_desc: The Pokémon has a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.

justified.name: Justified
justified.official_desc: When the Pokémon takes damage from a Dark-type move, its Attack stat is boosted by 1 stage.

magicbounce.name: Magic Bounce
magicbounce.official_desc: Instead of being affected by other Pokémon’s status moves, the Pokémon bounces them back at the user.

stancechange.name: Stance Change
stancechange.official_desc: The Pokémon changes into its Blade Forme when it attacks and changes into its Shield Forme when it uses the move King’s Shield.

rockhead.name: Rock Head
rockhead.official_desc: The Pokémon will not lose HP due to recoil damage from its moves.

unnerve.name: Unnerve
unnerve.official_desc: Makes opponents unable to eat Berries.

toughclaws.name: Tough Claws
toughclaws.official_desc: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s contact moves by 30%.

sturdy.name: Sturdy
sturdy.official_desc: If the Pokémon has full HP and takes damage from a move that would knock it out in one hit, it will endure the hit with 1 HP. The Pokémon is also immune to one-hit KO moves.

filter.name: Filter
filter.official_desc: Reduces the damage the Pokémon takes from supereffective moves by 25%.

synchronize.name: Synchronize
synchronize.official_desc: If the Pokémon is burned, paralyzed, poisoned, or badly poisoned by another Pokémon’s move or Ability, that Pokémon will also be inflicted with the same status condition.

innerfocus.name: Inner Focus
innerfocus.official_desc: The Pokémon never flinches when attacked and is unaffected by Intimidate.

magicguard.name: Magic Guard
magicguard.official_desc: The Pokémon takes damage only from attacks.

trace.name: Trace
trace.official_desc: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it changes its Ability to match that of an opponent.

sweetveil.name: Sweet Veil
sweetveil.official_desc: The Pokémon and its allies cannot become drowsy or be put to sleep.

aromaveil.name: Aroma Veil
aromaveil.official_desc: The Pokémon and its allies cannot gain the Infatuated, Taunted, Unable to Repeat, Move Disabled, Healing Prevented, or Encore statuses.

naturalcure.name: Natural Cure
naturalcure.official_desc: The Pokémon’s status conditions are cured when it switches out of battle.

pixilate.name: Pixilate
pixilate.official_desc: The Pokémon’s Normal-type moves become Fairy-type moves and their power is boosted by 20%.

static.name: Static
static.official_desc: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker has a 30% chance of being paralyzed.

plus.name: Plus
plus.official_desc: Boosts the Pokémon’s Sp. Atk stat by 50% if an ally with the Plus or Minus Ability is also in battle.

moldbreaker.name: Mold Breaker
moldbreaker.official_desc: The Pokémon’s moves are unaffected by the Ability of the target (with certain exceptions).

vitalspirit.name: Vital Spirit
vitalspirit.official_desc: The Pokémon cannot become drowsy or be put to sleep.

defiant.name: Defiant
defiant.official_desc: When the Pokémon has any of its stats lowered by an opponent, its Attack stat is boosted by 2 stages.

ripen.name: Ripen
ripen.official_desc: Doubles the effects of Berries eaten by the Pokémon.

gluttony.name: Gluttony
gluttony.official_desc: If the Pokémon is holding a Berry to be eaten when its HP drops to 1/4 or less of its max, it will instead eat the Berry when its HP drops to 1/2 or less of its max.

thickfat.name: Thick Fat
thickfat.official_desc: Halves the damage the Pokémon takes from Fire- and Ice-type moves.

waterbubble.name: Water Bubble
waterbubble.official_desc: Halves the damage the Pokémon takes from Fire-type moves and doubles the power of its Water-type moves. The Pokémon cannot be burned.

waterabsorb.name: Water Absorb
waterabsorb.official_desc: Water-type moves do not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they restore 1/4 of its max HP.

intimidate.name: Intimidate
intimidate.official_desc: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it lowers the Attack stats of opponents by 1 stage.

shedskin.name: Shed Skin
shedskin.official_desc: The Pokémon has a 30% chance of curing its own status conditions at the end of every turn.

flashfire.name: Flash Fire
flashfire.official_desc: Fire-type moves do not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they give the Pokémon the Flash Fire status.

stamina.name: Stamina
stamina.official_desc: When the Pokémon takes damage from a move, its Defense stat is boosted by 1 stage.

stalwart.name: Stalwart
stalwart.official_desc: The Pokémon ignores the effects of Abilities and moves that draw in moves.

swarm.name: Swarm
swarm.official_desc: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s Bug-type moves by 50% when its HP drops to 1/3 or less of its max.

insomnia.name: Insomnia
insomnia.official_desc: The Pokémon cannot become drowsy or be put to sleep.

sniper.name: Sniper
sniper.official_desc: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s critical hits by 125% instead of 50%.

weakarmor.name: Weak Armor
weakarmor.official_desc: When the Pokémon takes damage from a physical move, its Defense stat is lowered by 1 stage, but its Speed stat is boosted by 2 stages.

healer.name: Healer
healer.official_desc: The Pokémon has a 50% chance of curing the status conditions of its allies at the end of every turn.

regenerator.name: Regenerator
regenerator.official_desc: The Pokémon has 1/3 of its max HP restored when it switches out of battle.

klutz.name: Klutz
klutz.official_desc: Items do not work when held by the Pokémon.

refrigerate.name: Refrigerate
refrigerate.official_desc: The Pokémon’s Normal-type moves become Ice-type moves and their power is boosted by 20%.

strongjaw.name: Strong Jaw
strongjaw.official_desc: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s biting moves by 50%.

icebody.name: Ice Body
icebody.official_desc: The Pokémon has 1/16 of its max HP restored at the end of every turn in snow.

owntempo.name: Own Tempo
owntempo.official_desc: The Pokémon cannot become confused and is unaffected by Intimidate.

hugepower.name: Huge Power
hugepower.official_desc: Doubles the power of the Pokémon’s physical moves.

sapsipper.name: Sap Sipper
sapsipper.official_desc: Grass-type moves do not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they boost its Attack stat by 1 stage.

frisk.name: Frisk
frisk.official_desc: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it identifies opponents’ held items.

cursedbody.name: Cursed Body
cursedbody.official_desc: When the Pokémon takes damage from a move, the attacker has a 30% chance of gaining the Move Disabled status for 4 turns.

prankster.name: Prankster
prankster.official_desc: Increases the priority of the Pokémon’s status moves by 1 stage.

pickpocket.name: Pickpocket
pickpocket.official_desc: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, it will steal the held item of the attacker if it is not already holding an item.

swiftswim.name: Swift Swim
swiftswim.official_desc: Doubles the Pokémon’s Speed stat in rain.

adaptability.name: Adaptability
adaptability.official_desc: Boosts the power of moves of the same type as the Pokémon by 100% instead of 50%.

snowcloak.name: Snow Cloak
snowcloak.official_desc: Boosts the Pokémon’s evasiveness by 25% in snow.

slushrush.name: Slush Rush
slushrush.official_desc: Doubles the Pokémon’s Speed stat in snow.

electromorphosis.name: Electromorphosis
electromorphosis.official_desc: When the Pokémon takes damage from a move, it gains the Electric Boost status.

damp.name: Damp
damp.official_desc: All Pokémon become unable to use explosive moves. Explosive Abilities also fail to trigger.

torrent.name: Torrent
torrent.official_desc: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s Water-type moves by 50% when its HP drops to 1/3 or less of its max.

raindish.name: Rain Dish
raindish.official_desc: The Pokémon has 1/16 of its max HP restored at the end of every turn in rain.

megalauncher.name: Mega Launcher
megalauncher.official_desc: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s pulse moves by 50%.

blaze.name: Blaze
blaze.official_desc: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s Fire-type moves by 50% when its HP drops to 1/3 or less of its max.

speedboost.name: Speed Boost
speedboost.official_desc: Boosts the Pokémon’s Speed stat by 1 stage at the end of every turn.

solidrock.name: Solid Rock
solidrock.official_desc: Reduces the damage the Pokémon takes from supereffective moves by 25%.

angerpoint.name: Anger Point
angerpoint.official_desc: Boosts the Pokémon’s Attack stat to its sixth stage when the Pokémon takes a critical hit.

sheerforce.name: Sheer Force
sheerforce.official_desc: The Pokémon’s moves lose their additional effects, but the power of those moves will be boosted by 30%.

forecast.name: Forecast
forecast.official_desc: The Pokémon transforms with the weather to change its type to Water, Fire, or Ice.

flamebody.name: Flame Body
flamebody.official_desc: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker has a 30% chance of being burned.

infiltrator.name: Infiltrator
infiltrator.official_desc: When using its moves, the Pokémon ignores the effects of targets’ Light Screen, Reflect, Aurora Veil, Safeguard, and substitutes.

solarpower.name: Solar Power
solarpower.official_desc: In harsh sunlight, the Pokémon’s Sp. Atk stat is boosted by 50%, but it loses 1/8 of its max HP at the end of every turn.

drought.name: Drought
drought.official_desc: Summons harsh sunlight for 5 turns when the Pokémon enters a battle.

overgrow.name: Overgrow
overgrow.official_desc: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s Grass-type moves by 50% when its HP drops to 1/3 or less of its max.

bulletproof.name: Bulletproof
bulletproof.official_desc: The Pokémon is immune to ball and bomb moves.

levitate.name: Levitate
levitate.official_desc: The Pokémon floats off the ground, making it immune to Ground-type moves, as well as the Spikes, Toxic Spikes, and Sticky Web statuses.

cutecharm.name: Cute Charm
cutecharm.official_desc: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker has a 30% chance of gaining the Infatuated status if the attacker and the Pokémon are of opposite genders.

unaware.name: Unaware
unaware.official_desc: The Pokémon ignores the target’s stat changes when attacking, and ignores the attacker’s stat changes when being attacked. It cannot ignore changes to the Speed stat, however.

mummy.name: Mummy
mummy.official_desc: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker has its Ability changed to Mummy.

guts.name: Guts
guts.official_desc: When the Pokémon has a status condition, its Attack stat is boosted by 50%. Being burned does not halve the damage dealt by the Pokémon’s physical moves.

ironfist.name: Iron Fist
ironfist.official_desc: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s punching moves by 20%.

mirrorarmor.name: Mirror Armor
mirrorarmor.official_desc: Instead of being affected by stat-lowering effects, the Pokémon bounces them back at whichever Pokémon caused them.

hypercutter.name: Hyper Cutter
hypercutter.official_desc: The Pokémon’s Attack stat cannot be lowered by other Pokémon’s moves or Abilities.

scrappy.name: Scrappy
scrappy.official_desc: The Pokémon can hit Ghost types with Normal- and Fighting-type moves. It is also unaffected by Intimidate.

longreach.name: Long Reach
longreach.official_desc: None of the moves used by the Pokémon are considered contact moves.

cheekpouch.name: Cheek Pouch
cheekpouch.official_desc: The Pokémon has 1/3 of its max HP restored when it eats a Berry, in addition to the Berry’s usual effect.

pickup.name: Pickup
pickup.official_desc: If the Pokémon is not already holding an item, at the end of the turn it will pick up an item that was consumed by another Pokémon.

magician.name: Magician
magician.official_desc: If the Pokémon is not already holding an item, it will steal the held item from targets it deals damage to with its moves.

imposter.name: Imposter
imposter.official_desc: The Pokémon transforms into the Pokémon in front of it. It also copies all of that Pokémon’s stats apart from its HP.

poisonpoint.name: Poison Point
poisonpoint.official_desc: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker has a 30% chance of being poisoned.

poisontouch.name: Poison Touch
poisontouch.official_desc: When the Pokémon hits a target with a contact move, the target has a 30% chance of being poisoned.

clearbody.name: Clear Body
clearbody.official_desc: The Pokémon’s stats cannot be lowered by other Pokémon’s moves or Abilities.

multiscale.name: Multiscale
multiscale.official_desc: Halves the damage the Pokémon takes while its HP is full.

berserk.name: Berserk
berserk.official_desc: Boosts the Pokémon’s Sp. Atk stat by 1 stage when an attack causes its HP to drop to 1/2 or less of its max.

eelevate.name: Eelevate
eelevate.official_desc: The Pokémon floats off the ground, making it immune to Ground-type moves, as well as the Spikes, Toxic Spikes, and Sticky Web statuses. When the Pokémon knocks out a target with an attack, its highest stat is boosted by 1 stage.

reckless.name: Reckless
reckless.official_desc: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s moves by 20% if they have recoil or crash damage.

motordrive.name: Motor Drive
motordrive.official_desc: Electric-type moves do not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they boost its Speed stat by 1 stage.

competitive.name: Competitive
competitive.official_desc: When the Pokémon has any of its stats lowered by an opponent, its Sp. Atk stat is boosted by 2 stages.

opportunist.name: Opportunist
opportunist.official_desc: When an opponent’s stats are boosted, the Pokémon boosts its own stats in the exact same way.

sandrush.name: Sand Rush
sandrush.official_desc: Doubles the Pokémon’s Speed stat in a sandstorm.

sandforce.name: Sand Force
sandforce.official_desc: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s Rock-, Ground-, and Steel-type moves by 30% in a sandstorm.

piercingdrill.name: Piercing Drill
piercingdrill.official_desc: When the Pokémon uses contact moves, it can hit even targets that are protecting themselves, dealing 1/4 of the damage that the move would otherwise deal. Everything aside from the target’s protective effects is still triggered.

battlearmor.name: Battle Armor
battlearmor.official_desc: Attacks landed on the Pokémon will never be critical hits.

cudchew.name: Cud Chew
cudchew.official_desc: If the Pokémon eats a Berry, it will eat that same Berry once more at the end of the next turn.

armortail.name: Armor Tail
armortail.official_desc: Opponents are unable to use priority moves against the Pokémon or its allies.

dragonize.name: Dragonize
dragonize.official_desc: The Pokémon’s Normal-type moves become Dragon-type moves and their power is boosted by 20%.

hustle.name: Hustle
hustle.official_desc: When the Pokémon uses physical moves, its Attack stat is boosted by 50%, but its accuracy is lowered by 20%.

flowerveil.name: Flower Veil
flowerveil.official_desc: Grass-type allies are immune to status conditions and cannot have their stats lowered.

symbiosis.name: Symbiosis
symbiosis.official_desc: When an ally consumes an item, the Pokémon gives its own held item to that ally.

fairyaura.name: Fairy Aura
fairyaura.official_desc: Boosts the power of the Fairy-type moves of all Pokémon on the field by 33%.

overcoat.name: Overcoat
overcoat.official_desc: The Pokémon takes no damage from sandstorms and is immune to moves and Abilities involving powder.

furcoat.name: Fur Coat
furcoat.official_desc: Halves the damage the Pokémon takes from physical moves.

steadfast.name: Steadfast
steadfast.official_desc: When the Pokémon flinches, its Speed stat is boosted by 1 stage.

sharpness.name: Sharpness
sharpness.official_desc: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s slicing moves by 50%.

stench.name: Stench
stench.official_desc: When the Pokémon deals damage with its moves, there is a 10% chance that targets will flinch.

aftermath.name: Aftermath
aftermath.official_desc: Attackers that knock out the Pokémon with a contact move take damage equal to 1/4 of their max HP.

sandveil.name: Sand Veil
sandveil.official_desc: Boosts the Pokémon’s evasiveness by 25% in a sandstorm.

roughskin.name: Rough Skin
roughskin.official_desc: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker takes damage equal to 1/8 of its max HP.

telepathy.name: Telepathy
telepathy.official_desc: The Pokémon dodges attacks from its allies.

purifyingsalt.name: Purifying Salt
purifyingsalt.official_desc: Halves the damage the Pokémon takes from Ghost-type moves. The Pokémon is immune to status conditions.

shadowtag.name: Shadow Tag
shadowtag.official_desc: Opponents cannot be switched out of battle.

goodasgold.name: Good as Gold
goodasgold.official_desc: The Pokémon is immune to status moves used by other Pokémon.

moody.name: Moody
moody.official_desc: At the end of every turn, one of the Pokémon’s stats will be boosted by 2 stages, but another will be lowered by 1 stage.

toxicdebris.name: Toxic Debris
toxicdebris.official_desc: When the Pokémon takes damage from a physical move, it gives the opponent’s side the Toxic Spikes status.

corrosion.name: Corrosion
corrosion.official_desc: The Pokémon can poison or badly poison targets even if they’re Steel or Poison types.

poisonheal.name: Poison Heal
poisonheal.official_desc: If poisoned or badly poisoned, the Pokémon has 1/8 of its max HP restored at the end of every turn instead of losing HP.

noguard.name: No Guard
noguard.official_desc: The accuracy of moves used both by and against the Pokémon becomes 100%.

unseenfist.name: Unseen Fist
unseenfist.official_desc: When the Pokémon uses contact moves, it can hit even targets that are protecting themselves, dealing 1/4 of the damage that the move would otherwise deal. Everything aside from the target’s protective effects is still triggered.

shellarmor.name: Shell Armor
shellarmor.official_desc: Attacks landed on the Pokémon will never be critical hits.

gooey.name: Gooey
gooey.official_desc: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker’s Speed stat is lowered by 1 stage.

hydration.name: Hydration
hydration.official_desc: Cures the Pokémon’s status conditions at the end of every turn in rain.

protean.name: Protean
protean.official_desc: Changes the Pokémon’s type to the type of the move it’s about to use. This works only once per time the Pokémon enters battle.

moxie.name: Moxie
moxie.official_desc: When the Pokémon knocks out a target with an attack, its Attack stat is boosted by 1 stage.

anticipation.name: Anticipation
anticipation.official_desc: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it senses whether the opponents know any one-hit KO moves or moves that are super effective against it.

unburden.name: Unburden
unburden.official_desc: Doubles the Pokémon’s Speed stat when its held item is consumed or lost.

dryskin.name: Dry Skin
dryskin.official_desc: Water-type moves do not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they restore 1/4 of its max HP. However, the Pokémon takes 25% more damage from Fire-type moves. The Pokémon has 1/8 of its max HP restored at the end of every turn in rain, but it loses 1/8 of its max HP at the end of every turn in harsh sunlight.

skilllink.name: Skill Link
skilllink.official_desc: The Pokémon’s multistrike moves always hit the maximum number of times.

sandstream.name: Sand Stream
sandstream.official_desc: Summons a sandstorm for 5 turns when the Pokémon enters a battle.

earlybird.name: Early Bird
earlybird.official_desc: The Pokémon awakens from sleep twice as fast as other Pokémon.

fluffy.name: Fluffy
fluffy.official_desc: Halves the damage the Pokémon takes from contact moves, but doubles the damage taken from Fire-type moves.

supersweetsyrup.name: Supersweet Syrup
supersweetsyrup.official_desc: When the Pokémon enters a battle, opponents’ evasiveness is lowered by 1 stage. This Ability is triggered only once per battle.

stickyhold.name: Sticky Hold
stickyhold.official_desc: The Pokémon’s held item cannot be stolen or removed by other Pokémon.

voltabsorb.name: Volt Absorb
voltabsorb.official_desc: Electric-type moves do not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they restore 1/4 of its max HP.

quickfeet.name: Quick Feet
quickfeet.official_desc: When the Pokémon has a status condition, its Speed stat is boosted by 50%. Being paralyzed does not lower the Pokémon’s Speed stat.

parentalbond.name: Parental Bond
parentalbond.official_desc: The parent and child attack one after the other. The power of the child’s attacks is 1/4 of those of the parent.

supremeoverlord.name: Supreme Overlord
supremeoverlord.official_desc: When the Pokémon enters a battle, the power of its moves is boosted by 10% for each Pokémon in its party that has been defeated in the battle already. The maximum boost is 50%.

leafguard.name: Leaf Guard
leafguard.official_desc: The Pokémon is immune to status conditions in harsh sunlight.

chlorophyll.name: Chlorophyll
chlorophyll.official_desc: Doubles the Pokémon’s Speed stat in harsh sunlight.

rivalry.name: Rivalry
rivalry.official_desc: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s moves by 25% against targets of the same gender, and lowers it by 25% against targets of the opposite gender. The power remains the same as usual if either Pokémon’s gender is unknown.

keeneye.name: Keen Eye
keeneye.official_desc: The Pokémon ignores changes to targets’ evasiveness and its accuracy cannot be lowered.

contrary.name: Contrary
contrary.official_desc: Reverses any stat changes affecting the Pokémon so that attempts to boost its stats instead lower them—and attempts to lower its stats will boost them.

suctioncups.name: Suction Cups
suctioncups.official_desc: The Pokémon is unaffected by the moves and held items of other Pokémon that would force it to switch out of battle.

oblivious.name: Oblivious
oblivious.official_desc: The Pokémon cannot gain the Infatuated or Taunted statuses and is unaffected by Intimidate.

lightningrod.name: Lightning Rod
lightningrod.official_desc: The Pokémon draws in all Electric-type moves. These moves do not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they boost its Sp. Atk stat by 1 stage.

minus.name: Minus
minus.official_desc: Boosts the Pokémon’s Sp. Atk stat by 50% if an ally with the Plus or Minus Ability is also in battle.

friendguard.name: Friend Guard
friendguard.official_desc: Reduces the damage allies take by 25%.

technician.name: Technician
technician.official_desc: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s moves by 50% if their power is 60 or less.

purepower.name: Pure Power
purepower.official_desc: Doubles the power of the Pokémon’s physical moves.

megasol.name: Mega Sol
megasol.official_desc: Even when the sunlight has not turned harsh, the Pokémon can use its moves as if the weather were harsh sunlight.

marvelscale.name: Marvel Scale
marvelscale.official_desc: When the Pokémon has a status condition, its Defense stat is boosted by 50%.

disguise.name: Disguise
disguise.official_desc: When the Pokémon is in its Disguised Form and would take damage from a move, it loses 1/8 of its max HP instead of taking the damage, then changes into its Busted Form.

hungerswitch.name: Hunger Switch
hungerswitch.official_desc: The Pokémon changes its form, alternating between its Full Belly Mode and Hangry Mode at the end of every turn.

tangledfeet.name: Tangled Feet
tangledfeet.official_desc: Doubles the Pokémon’s evasiveness if it is confused.

screencleaner.name: Screen Cleaner
screencleaner.official_desc: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it removes the Light Screen, Reflect, and Aurora Veil statuses.

forewarn.name: Forewarn
forewarn.official_desc: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it identifies the move with the highest power among all the moves the opponents know.

eartheater.name: Earth Eater
eartheater.official_desc: Ground-type moves do not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they restore 1/4 of its max HP.

zerotohero.name: Zero to Hero
zerotohero.official_desc: The Pokémon changes into its Hero Form when it switches out of battle.

receiver.name: Receiver
receiver.official_desc: The Pokémon changes its Ability to match that of a defeated ally.

drizzle.name: Drizzle
drizzle.official_desc: Summons rain for 5 turns when the Pokémon enters a battle.

bigpecks.name: Big Pecks
bigpecks.official_desc: The Pokémon’s Defense stat cannot be lowered by other Pokémon’s moves or Abilities.

aerilate.name: Aerilate
aerilate.official_desc: The Pokémon’s Normal-type moves become Flying-type moves and their power is boosted by 20%.

liquidvoice.name: Liquid Voice
liquidvoice.official_desc: The Pokémon’s sound-based moves become Water-type moves.

firemane.name: Fire Mane
firemane.official_desc: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s Fire-type moves by 50%.

surgesurfer.name: Surge Surfer
surgesurfer.official_desc: Doubles the Pokémon’s Speed stat on Electric Terrain.

electricsurge.name: Electric Surge
electricsurge.official_desc: Turns the entire field into Electric Terrain for 5 turns when the Pokémon enters a battle.

wanderingspirit.name: Wandering Spirit
wanderingspirit.official_desc: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, it swaps Abilities with the attacker.

stall.name: Stall
stall.official_desc: The Pokémon’s moves go last among moves of the same priority.

sandspit.name: Sand Spit
sandspit.official_desc: Summons a sandstorm for 5 turns when the Pokémon takes damage from moves.

spicyspray.name: Spicy Spray
spicyspray.official_desc: When the Pokémon takes damage from a move, it burns the attacker.

hospitality.name: Hospitality
hospitality.official_desc: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it restores 1/4 of its ally’s max HP.

heatproof.name: Heatproof
heatproof.official_desc: Halves the damage the Pokémon takes from Fire-type moves and from being burned.

quickdraw.name: Quick Draw
quickdraw.official_desc: The Pokémon’s moves have a 30% chance of going first among moves of the same priority.

curiousmedicine.name: Curious Medicine
curiousmedicine.official_desc: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it removes all stat changes from its allies.

immunity.name: Immunity
immunity.official_desc: The Pokémon cannot be poisoned or badly poisoned.

illuminate.name: Illuminate
illuminate.official_desc: The Pokémon ignores changes to targets’ evasiveness and its accuracy cannot be lowered.

analytic.name: Analytic
analytic.official_desc: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s moves by 30% when the Pokémon is the last to move that turn.

mimicry.name: Mimicry
mimicry.official_desc: The Pokémon’s type changes depending on the terrain.

galewings.name: Gale Wings
galewings.official_desc: Increases the priority of the Pokémon’s Flying-type moves by 1 stage while its HP is full.

whitesmoke.name: White Smoke
whitesmoke.official_desc: The Pokémon’s stats cannot be lowered by other Pokémon’s moves or Abilities.

merciless.name: Merciless
merciless.official_desc: The Pokémon’s attacks become critical hits if the target is poisoned or badly poisoned.

harvest.name: Harvest
harvest.official_desc: If the Pokémon has used a Berry, it has a 50% chance of creating another one at the end of every turn. In harsh sunlight, the Pokémon will definitely create a Berry.

queenlymajesty.name: Queenly Majesty
queenlymajesty.official_desc: Opponents are unable to use priority moves against the Pokémon or its allies.

innardsout.name: Innards Out
innardsout.official_desc: When the Pokémon takes damage from a move that knocks it out, it deals the same amount of damage to the attacker.

effectspore.name: Effect Spore
effectspore.official_desc: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker has a 30% chance of being poisoned, paralyzed, or put to sleep.

shielddust.name: Shield Dust
shielddust.official_desc: The Pokémon is immune to additional effects from attacks.

compoundeyes.name: Compound Eyes
compoundeyes.official_desc: Boosts the accuracy of the Pokémon’s moves by 30%.

illusion.name: Illusion
illusion.official_desc: The Pokémon enters battle disguised as the last Pokémon in its party. It reverts to its usual appearance when it takes damage from a move.
